heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyWe care about your privacy.This Privacy Policy applies to your usage ofthe software and services provided by LGANA.We don't collect any personal information, weonly collect some information about your device and will never sell or sharethis information with other legal entities for commercial purposes,except in the cases when it's required as apart of the Services you requested.

heading_content_part: The information we collect and how we use it

The information you provideEvery time you login to the Chat rooms, servers log an entry that includes dateand time, your IP address, your guest or registered nickname, client platform,client software version, device model and serial numbers. We use thisinformation for analytical purposes in aggregated form.

Public channelsWhen you login to a public chat room, your nickname is visible to other usersconnected to the same room and only Administrators can see your IP Address andknow your country based on it.
Communication privacyWe do not record or keep track of your voice , video or text communication inusing the Service.
DisclosureServices may disclose personally identifiable information when it's required tocomply with law enforcement requests or subpoenas when you violate the Terms ofService.
AdvertisementsWe uses Google's AdMob advertising service.Google's privacy policy is available athttps://www.google.com/intl/en/policies/privacy
ChangesThis privacy policy may be modified from time to time.
